label: Options Controls
description: Asset class, venue, settlement type, main tab selector, and watchlist toggle for options and futures.

l0.notes: 0.1 pass — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 pass — requiredEntitlements: ['options-trading']. 0.3 pass — availableOn: ['options']. 0.4 pass — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 pass — widget file does not import from lib/mocks/. 0.6 N/A — pure control bar; no data to load; all state is synchronous context state. 0.7 N/A — pure control bar; no data list to be empty; renders selectors unconditionally. 0.8 N/A — pure control bar; no data fetching; no error state applicable. 0.9 pass — no dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — widget reads all state and setters exclusively from useOptionsData(). 1.2 pass — options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130). 1.3 N/A — control bar drives asset/venue selection; it is the input, not a filtered output. 1.4 N/A — control bar is not filtered by client. 1.5 N/A — control bar is not filtered by strategy. 1.6 N/A — control bar renders unconditionally; empty scope means no filter applied to the downstream widgets it drives. 1.7 N/A — no reference data constants in widget file.
